subcodes.first_line: A Book from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the lights of the Countenance and hath voiced the praise of his Lord amidst the servants, that the call of the All-Merciful may draw him near [3.5s]... ...O concourse of divines!  Ye shall not henceforward behold yourselves possessed of any power, inasmuch as We have seized it from you
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا الی من فاز بانوار الوجه و نطق بثناء ربه بین العباد لیجذبه ندآء الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @wisdom [hikmat], @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
